title: 秘密のデート！？心たぎるランデブー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm watching the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!
The race is a heart-stopper in which the magical
girl Umamusume, Sweep Tosho, comes out on
top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear some spectators call this race very
prestigious. That means I'll become a princess if I
win it, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to enter the Queen Elizabeth II Cup one
day! With that decided, all I need to do is train!
Princess☆Axe Kick! Hiyah!
